pi_items.source: Alan Mathison Turing - verified via Wikipedia, Britannica, and academic database entries. The 'M' stands for Mathison, his middle name. Confirmed in primary source: https://philpapers.org/rec/TUROCN

Verified through Wikipedia (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alan_Turing) and academic publications including the original 1936 paper 'On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem'

Alan Mathison Turing - same author. Verified via PhilPapers (https://philpapers.org/rec/TURCMA) and Mind journal publication (1950). Confirmed in official citation: A. M. Turing (1950) Computing Machinery and Intelligence. Mind 49: 433-460.
Verified through 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' publication (1950) in Mind journal. Standard academic attribution.

Claude Elwood Shannon - verified via Wikipedia (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Claude_Shannon) and multiple academic sources. The 'E' stands for Elwood, his middle name. Confirmed in publication: 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (1948) in Bell System Technical Journal by C. E. Shannon.
Verified through Wikipedia (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Claude_Shannon) and the original 1948 Bell System Technical Journal publication

Claude Elwood Shannon - same author. Verified as co-author (with Warren Weaver) of 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' (1949) from University of Illinois Press. Consistent with verified middle initial E (Elwood).
Verified through publication records. Amazon listing confirms: 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication: Claude E. Shannon, Warren Weaver'

Geoffrey Everest Hinton - verified via Wikipedia (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Geoffrey_Hinton) and ACM Turing Award page (https://amturing.acm.org/award_winners/hinton_4791679.cfm). The 'E' stands for Everest, his middle name. Confirmed in academic citation: Krizhevsky, A., Sutskever, I. and Hinton, G.E. (2012) ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks.
Verified through NIPS 2012 proceedings (https://papers.nips.cc/paper/4824-imagenet-classification-with-deep-convolutional-neural-networks) and Wikipedia entries for the AlexNet paper

privileged_info_summary: All five target author names in the metadata are verified correct. Alan M. Turing (Mathison is his middle name) authored both 'On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem' (1936) and 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' (1950). Claude E. Shannon (Elwood is his middle name) authored both 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (1948) and 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' (1949, co-authored with Warren Weaver). Geoffrey E. Hinton (Everest is his middle name) is one of the authors of 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' (2012). All papers are real, well-published academic works. The task data is synthetic (seeded from seed_library.py for testing), but based on real publications.
